## Summary

Describe the problem and the solution.

## Compatibility

List affected routes, providers, storage backends, configuration keys, or UI workflows. Write `None` when there is no compatibility impact.

## Verification

- [ ] Ruff lint and format checks pass.
- [ ] Backend tests pass.
- [ ] Frontend JavaScript syntax check passes.
- [ ] Dependency audit passes.
- [ ] I added or updated regression tests for behavioral changes.
- [ ] I updated documentation and screenshots where needed.
- [ ] I verified that no credentials, tokens, personal data, or runtime files are included.

## Evidence

Include relevant test output, API examples, logs with secrets removed, or screenshots.

## Rollback

Describe how to revert this change and whether it modifies stored data.
